task_completion.description: Verify that the leftover modules TestModule1 and TestModule2 have been deleted.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the main GPredict window tabs or the module list. There should be no tabs or windows named 'TestModule1' or 'TestModule2'.

task_completion.description: Verify the addition of the White Sands ground station with correct coordinates.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a Ground Station configuration window or list showing 'White Sands' with Latitude ~32.5007, Longitude ~106.6086 W (or -106.6086), and Altitude 1219m.

task_completion.description: Verify the addition of the Wallops Island ground station with correct coordinates.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a Ground Station configuration window or list showing 'Wallops Island' with Latitude ~37.9402, Longitude ~75.4664 W (or -75.4664), and Altitude 12m.

task_completion.description: Verify the creation of the LEO_Comms module containing the specified satellites.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a module tab or window named 'LEO_Comms'. The list or radar view within this module must include ISS (ZARYA), SO-50, AO-91, AO-92, CAS-4A, and CAS-4B.

task_completion.description: Verify that the White Sands ground station is set as the module-specific QTH for LEO_Comms.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the module properties/configuration window for 'LEO_Comms'. The 'Ground Station' or 'QTH' dropdown/setting should be explicitly set to 'White Sands'.

task_completion.description: Verify that the global default ground station is updated to White Sands.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the GPredict Preferences window under the 'Ground Stations' section. 'White Sands' should be selected or listed as the default ground station.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent used the GPredict graphical user interface to make changes.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show GPredict dialog boxes (Preferences, Edit Ground Station, Module Properties) rather than terminal windows editing configuration files directly.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent interacted with the actual GPredict application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The GPredict application window should be visible with its standard layout, menus, and map/radar views, not a mocked-up text file or script output.

integrity.description: Check that the agent did not bypass the UI by using command-line text editors.
integrity.visual_evidence: There should be no terminal windows open showing 'nano', 'vim', or 'echo' commands writing directly to the '~/.config/Gpredict/' directory.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Satellites required in LEO_Comms: ISS (25544), SO-50 (27607), AO-91 (43017), AO-92 (43137), CAS-4A (42761), CAS-4B (42759). White Sands coordinates: 32.5007 N, 106.6086 W (or -106.6086), Altitude: 1219m. Wallops Island coordinates: 37.9402 N, 75.4664 W (or -75.4664), Altitude: 12m.
